secrets.name: eanSearchToken
secrets.label: EAN-Search API token
secrets.description: Optional token from ean-search.org. Adds a 1.2B-barcode database (good for EU/PAL releases) on top of the free UPCItemDB lookup.

secrets.name: barcodeLookupKey
secrets.label: Barcode Lookup API key
secrets.description: Optional API key from barcodelookup.com. Adds an extra international barcode database with brand and category data.
